title: asset content_hash doesn't match the inflated bytes
rationale: An asset entry's content_hash is the integrity anchor for its bytes — if a viewer can be tricked into accepting a mismatch, asset substitution attacks become possible. Phase 4.6.9 extended `mdz verify` to walk every assets[<category>][] entry and check each declared content_hash against the actual bytes; this fixture confirms the verifier rejects a mismatch.
